title: test_signal_engine_drift_detection
description: Verify that the Signal Engine API correctly reads Linear data and detects drift indicators using the defined heuristics.

title: test_product_brain_multi_agent_debate
description: Test the Product Brain API to ensure it performs multi-agent LLM debates among Cynic, Optimist, and Strategist agents and synthesizes risk accurately.

title: test_coordinator_intervention_selection
description: Validate that the Coordinator API selects optimal interventions from the predefined taxonomy based on input risk data.

title: test_governor_policy_checks
description: Ensure the Governor API performs all 8 deterministic policy checks correctly to guarantee bounded and safe actions.

title: test_executor_linear_writes_with_hitl_approval
description: Test the Executor API to confirm it executes Linear writes such as comments and issues only after human-in-the-loop (HITL) approval.
